justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal requests, including specific times, general morning preferences, and date changes.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively handled unavailability by checking broader timeframes and then offering the earliest available slot, which the user accepted.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all requests without redundant questions or unnecessary turns, leading to a quick resolution.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent consistently providing clear information and appropriate apologies when no slots were found.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully from initial unavailability by expanding the search and offering relevant alternatives while maintaining full context.
